title: Doctor Reveals Why Medical Professionals Can’t Cure Your Disease

chunks.title: Introduction to Personal Experience
chunks.summary: Dr. Paul Saladino introduces himself, reflecting on his experiences in medical education and the lack of nutritional training throughout his medical journey. He shares his thoughts on the state of Western medicine and how it fails to address the root causes of health issues.
chunks.transcript: what is up amfest it is so good to be here with all of you today it is so good to be here with thousands of people who saw the direction this country was going in and took a stand for change I have two things to talk to you about today one of them is very dark and sad but the other is hopeful and full of power I am a traditionally trained medical doctor my name is Paul saladino I went to medical school the University of Arizona in Tucson what's up in four years of medical school I had exactly zero courses in nutrition there was no discussion throughout four years of medical school about what is actually causing humans to get sick to even apply to medical school I had to do four years of undergrad at the University of uh William and Mary I studied chemistry no discussion of nutrition no requirements of nutrition to actually apply to medical school before medical school I was a PA I worked as a physician assistant in cardiology PA School four years in cardiology as a PA no discussion of nutrition no real discussion of what is making people sick at a root cause level I was literally told by the cardiologist that I worked with think here think in the heart box do not think of the whole body in the Western Medical system we are badly

chunks.title: Critique of the Medical System
chunks.summary: Dr. Saladino discusses his disillusionment with the Western medical system, pointing out the prevalence of pharmaceutical influences in medical education and the neglect of nutritional education. He emphasizes how this focus contributes to a broken healthcare system where patients remain ill.
chunks.transcript: broken we are not serving patients well after medical school I went to residency at the University of Washington in Seattle one of the most prestigious universities in the country one of the highest rated hospitals in the country for Primary Care no discussion of nutrition no discussion of food or food quality and no discussion of what is actually making patients sick what I was told what I was charged with throughout my medical education was memorizing thousands of drugs understanding their side effects and understanding when to prescribe them the medical system is badly broken and I've been through it and I think this is not surprising Pharmaceuticals look they have a role in our society they're not entirely bad but the pharmaceutical companies are wildly invested in medical education in medical research at the level of the FDA at the level of the USDA there is profound corruption 19 out of the 20 members of the USDA dietary guidelines committee have ties to the food industry and Pharma what is going on here this is why we are so sick as humans this is why we are so sick but there is hope here there is a ray of light there is something that is better after seeing all of this I eventually left Western medicine I

chunks.title: Transition to Empowering Others
chunks.summary: After leaving traditional medicine, Dr. Saladino began creating educational content online aimed at empowering individuals to take control of their health. He shares stories of people who have found healing through dietary changes, challenging the notion that many diseases are incurable.
chunks.transcript: don't practice Western medicine as a doctor I became so disillusioned that five years ago I started making no cost zero cost content on the internet I became an internet doctor and now I make content I make educational content and the goal of that content is to just give people to empower all of you to be able to make yourselves healthy again what I have seen in those 5 years is profound many of you have experienced this I have met so many of you at this conference who have already told me your stories have already told me how you have healed yourselves by changing the quality of the foods you eat this is incredible I have seen so many people thousands of people in those five years heal from diseases that Western medicine taught me and my colleagues were incurable diabetes obesity depression dementia insomnia infertility autoimmune conditions autoimmune skin conditions like eczema psoriasis thyroid conditions GI conditions Crohn's ulcerative colitis rheumatoid arthritis multiple sclerosis these are profoundly scary words in Western medicine these are diseases that cannot be cured and yet many of you have cured these diseases I've met you at this conference and I've seen thousands

chunks.title: The Hope for Healing
chunks.summary: Dr. Saladino expresses optimism about individuals' ability to regain their health through dietary improvements. He emphasizes that everyone has a 'god-given birthright' to health and encourages listeners to take responsibility for their well-being through food choices.
chunks.transcript: of people do this and so this is the hope the tragedy is that Western medicine is broken here is the Hope here's what I will tell you based on my personal experience you have a god-given Birthright to w profound Health you have a god-given birth to that and if you change the quality of the food that you eat and the way that you are living you can heal yourself that is what I want you to know if you take nothing else away from this short talk that we have about health about making America healthy again remember that whatever you are suffering from if any of you have chronic illness any of the things that I mentioned earlier and you are suffering and you are without help if you are without hope maybe your doctor's telling you that you need to take medications remember this you have a god-given Birthright to health you're body will heal itself if you simply change the quality of the foods that you

chunks.title: Practical Dietary Advice
chunks.summary: He provides specific guidelines for healthier eating, stressing the importance of whole foods and warning against processed items. Dr. Saladino advocates for a diet consisting primarily of meat and plants while avoiding foods that do not align with historical dietary practices.
chunks.transcript: are eating and how you are living as a human every day day in and day out I have seen it time and time again I know there are people in this room who have done this let me hear some noise who has changed their diet yes and I want all of you that haven't changed your diet that are still suffering to hear your members of this audience to hear your community tell you this this is possible do not despair the Western Medical system will probably not give you this information but if you change your diet if you change the way you live you can heal yourself and it's not complicated guys it's very simple eat meat eat plants do not eat things that your great-grandmother would not recognize do not eat seed oils that's engine lubricant it should have stayed as engine lubricant right do not eat food dyes do not eat Ultra processed foods do not let convenience undermine

chunks.title: Empowerment Through Food Choices
chunks.summary: Concluding his talk, Dr. Saladino reinforces the importance of making conscious food choices for overall health. He highlights the communal benefits of individual health improvements and encourages everyone to embrace their ability to create positive change in their lives and communities.
chunks.transcript: your path to health and profound life in this life and so this is the most important part of this whole talk all of us in this room have a profound fundamental Birthright god-given to be healthy and all of us have things that we need to do in the world we have to do good in the world we need to be healthy as Americans to do the most good in the world and you have the ability to make yourself healthy and you do that by changing the food that you eat so understand you have profound power in every choice that you make every day and do not dispair if you have a chronic illness if you're still suffering change the way you eat and the quality of your life will change forever everyone in your community will get healthier your parents your siblings your children you will show up better for every single person in your life and this is what I wish for all of you because we all have very important work to do in this world may we do it well and may we make
